# Fixture Parked

A hermetic fixture pinned to the LEGACY `parked-decision` terminal, the state an older vault (like
forma) could sit in before decision 0036 made a 🔴 stop parking the whole loop. Nothing new emits
this line, but the parser and the canvas must still read it tolerantly: the terminal banner invites
a ruling, and nothing crashes.

## Current stage

Current stage: research: parked-decision: framing-lock

The loop parked under the old law. Its next resume runs under decision 0036: the framing 🔴 gets
recorded as proposed and the loop runs on to the dry streak.

## Recommended next step

Run `design-studio-research` to resume; the framing call parks as a proposed decision and the loop
keeps sweeping the open unknowns.
